'''R2-D0''' (Artoo-Deo), or '''Deo''', was [[Tay Vanis|Tiree's]] R2-model astromech utility droid. Deo escaped from the various scrapes Tiree was caught in, and assisted several groups of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents in rescuing Tiree.

He also helped rookie Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] navigate the abandoned [[Mine/Legends|mine]] within [[Mesa 291]] on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] and contained coordinates to rendezvous with [[Lens Reekeene|General Lens Reekeene's]] command ship, ''[[Home]]''.

==Biography==
{{Quote|The shuttle is in a cavern on the next level down. This astromech droid, R2-D0, knowns the way there. I hope you can fly the craft, because I might not make it back.|A recording of Tay Vanis to Rebel recruits|<ref name="Breakout" />}}
R2-D0 was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] serving the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was partnered with [[Agent/Legends|Agent]] [[Tay Vanis]], more commonly known as "Tiree". Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Vanis and R2-D0 were scheduled to meet with a group of prospective new recruits at [[Mesa 291]] on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. However, the meeting was discovered by [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] agent [[Mar Barezz]]. Vanis attempted to draw off Barezz and the Imperial presence, leaving R2-D0 and some supplies behind at the meeting point. R2-D0 was directed to lead the recruits through the abandoned [[lidium]] [[Mining/Legends|mine]] to escape craft, and he held the coordinates to a Rebel base. The recruits successfully made their way through the mine with R2-D0's help to a group of hidden [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]]. An injured Vanis was also found there, and R2-D0 interfaced with one of the Y-wing's [[Astromech socket/Legends|droid sockets]] to provide the location of the hidden Rebel base for their escape.<ref name="Breakout" />

{{Droid-stub}}
